title: Three Saudi oil tankers carrying 6 million barrels cross Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: The Saudi tankers switched their transponders on Thursday after hiding their location for more than two months.
summary_public: The Saudi tankers switched their transponders on Thursday after hiding their location for more than two months.

SA.label: neutral
SA.evidence: Three Saudi oil tankers carrying 6 million barrels cross Strait of Hormuz
